name: NINJA REVENGER
short_description: BURN ENERGY, SEEK REVENGE. ENERGY-SACRIFICE TECH AWAKENS THE POWER OF VENGEANCE. AS DEATH LOOMS, UNLEASH BERSERK.
detailed_description:
BURN ENERGY, SEEK REVENGE.

ENERGY-SACRIFICE TECH AWAKENS THE POWER OF VENGEANCE.

AS DEATH LOOMS, UNLEASH BERSERK.

GAUGES

ENERGY ― DEPLETES OVER TIME OR WHEN DAMAGED, AND RECOVERS BY DEFEATING FOES OR GATHERING DATA CHIPS. LOSING ALL RESULTS IN DEFEAT.

ADRENALINE ― RISES AS YOU TAKE RISKS, AND CAN REACH ITS PEAK TO UNLEASH BERSERKER.

ACTIONS

BLADE ― DELIVER A SPINNING SLASH THAT SWEEPS THROUGH FOES AS YOU ADVANCE.

KUNAI ― THROW PRECISELY AT A DISTANT FOE TO CHIP AWAY THEIR HEALTH.

ROLL ― QUICKLY DODGE FOE ATTACKS, BUT SOME ARE UNAVOIDABLE.

BERSERK

AWAKING THE POWER OF VENGEANCE PUTS YOU INTO A FOCUSED STATE, SLOWING DOWN TIME.

WHEN THE TIME COMES, YOUR CLONES WILL PAINFULLY SLASH THEIR TARGETS, BUT THE RECOIL WILL TEMPORARILY FREEZE THEM.

BURN ENERGY, SEEK REVENGE!
